title: Independence Day Celebration
body: Join us for the Independence Day celebration at the office auditorium. There will be cultural performances, games, and refreshments for all employees.

title: Work From Home Policy Update
body: Employees may work remotely up to two days each week with manager approval. Please update your work schedule in the employee portal.

title: Quarterly Town Hall
body: The leadership team will present company performance, upcoming projects, and answer employee questions during the quarterly town hall meeting.
